scripts.build: npm run build -w @china-slot-game/game-math && npm run build -w @china-slot-game/api
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @china-slot-game/game-math && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @china-slot-game/game-math && npm run test --workspaces
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @china-slot-game/game-math && npm run typecheck --workspaces
